nasb.text: Then David said, “This is the house of the Lord God, and this is the altar of burnt offering for Israel.”

esv.text: Then David said, “Here shall be the house of the Lord God and here the altar of burnt offering for Israel.”

cnv.text: 大衛吩咐人召集住在以色列地的外族人，又派石匠開鑿石頭，要建造　神的殿。

ccb.text: 大卫说：“耶和华上帝的殿和以色列人献燔祭的坛要在这里。”
